implementationSummary: Layer 2 sandbox write resources behind SandboxWriteClientFactory.create_resources(): inventory update, product create/edit (PUT), fulfillment combine/ship/batch/split/uncombine, and supply-chain confirm shipment. ProductionReadClientFactory unchanged for write exposure. Promotion lifecycle (#289) deferred per cached scope decision.
